---
title: "Map Controls"
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/"
)
```


Various controls can be added to the map TODO (link to control examples)


```{r setup}
library(toro)

map() |>
  add_cursor_coords_control() |>
  add_zoom_control()
```
